nasb.text: Now then, deliver up the men, the worthless fellows in Gibeah, that we may put them to death and remove this wickedness from Israel.” But the sons of Benjamin would not listen to the voice of their brothers, the sons of Israel.

esv.text: Now therefore give up the men, the worthless fellows in Gibeah, that we may put them to death and purge evil from Israel.” But the Benjaminites would not listen to the voice of their brothers, the people of Israel.

cnv.text: 現在你們要把那些人，基比亞的無賴之徒，交出來，我們好處死他們，從以色列中除掉這惡。”只是便雅憫人卻不肯聽從他們的兄弟以色列人的話。

ccb.text: 现在把那些基比亚的无赖交出来，我们要处死他们，从以色列铲除罪恶。”便雅悯人却充耳不闻，
